title: Blockfront for survival datapack
description: This datapack allows blockfront to be integrated into survival
body:
**Discontinued due to a mod version taking its place!**

This datapack allows you to use the blockfront guns in survival! each one with a custom recipe, and also allows for ammo bags to work, and ammo points to be created!

To create an ammo point, throw an ammo bag(item) on top of an empty open crate.
To remove destroy the crate.
